msg_start_new_user:
Please select the bot's language:
Будь ласка, оберіть мову бота:
acc_name_empty: Name cannot be empty! Action cancelled.
acc_name_entered:
Name: {name}
Enter initial amount or press skip.
acc_skip_initial_amount:
Initial amount: not specified
Enter monthly budget or press skip.
acc_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Enter a number, for example: 159.90
acc_initial_amount_saved:
Initial amount: {initial_amount}
Enter monthly budget or press skip.
acc_invalid_monthly_budget: Invalid amount. Enter a number, for example: 159.90
acc_save_failed: Failed to save. Check Notion settings.
acc_delete_failed: Failed to delete. Check Notion settings.
exp_name_empty: Name cannot be empty! Action cancelled.
exp_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Enter a number, for example: 159.90
exp_enter_date: Enter expense date in DD.MM.YYYY format (e.g., 23.03.2026) or choose today's date.
exp_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Please enter in DD.MM.YYYY format (e.g., 23.03.2026).
exp_no_accounts: You don't have any accounts yet. Account will be skipped.
exp_choose_account: Choose an account for the expense:
exp_no_categories: You don't have any categories yet. Category will be skipped.
exp_save_failed: Failed to save. Check Notion settings.
exp_not_found: Expense with this name not found.
exp_no_expenses: You don't have any expenses yet.
exp_multiple_found: Found more than one expense with this name, please select by date:
exp_delete_failed: Failed to delete. Check Notion settings.
ai_rate_limit: 🤖 Rate limit exceeded. Please wait a minute and try again.
ai_recommendations_failed: Failed to get recommendations from AI.
ai_analysis_failed: Failed to get analysis from AI.
rcp_analyzing: Analyzing receipt image... This can take up to a minute.
rcp_invalid_file: The uploaded file does not look like a valid image.
rcp_parsing_failed: Failed to recognize the receipt. Please make sure the photo is clear and contains a receipt.
rcp_not_receipt: This image does not look like a receipt. Please send a photo of a receipt.
rcp_no_accounts: No accounts found. Please add an account first.
rcp_identified:
Receipt identified: {store_name} ({total_amount})
Found {items_count} items.
From which account was this expense made?
rcp_session_expired: Session expired or data is invalid.
rcp_save_error: An error occurred while saving the receipt to Notion.
rep_invalid_date_format: Invalid date format. Try again (e.g. 1.10.2023 or 1.10.2023 - 15.10.2023)
rep_no_expenses: No expenses found for this period.
rep_choose_account_trend: Choose an account for trend analysis:
rep_enter_trend_dates: Enter a date range for the expense trend graph (e.g. 01.01.2024 or 01.01.2024-31.12.2024):
rep_analyzing_overbudget: Analyzing budget limit exceedances using AI...
grexp_name_empty: Name cannot be empty! Action cancelled.
grexp_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Enter a number, for example: 159.90
grexp_enter_date: Enter date in DD.MM.YYYY format or choose today's date.
grexp_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Please enter in DD.MM.YYYY format.
grexp_send_receipt: Send receipt photo if you have one.
grexp_save_error: An error occurred while saving group expense.
grexp_enter_delete_name: Enter group expense name to delete.
msg_help:
ℹ️ *Help*

This bot helps you track finances in Notion.
• *Add account*: Create a new wallet/card
• *Add expense*: Log a personal expense
• *Add group expense*: Log a shared expense
• *Analytics*: View stats or expenses trends

You can also just send a photo of a receipt, and the AI will recognize it!
msg_notion_not_connected:
⚠️ *Notion not connected*
You need to connect your Notion account so the bot can save your finances. Click the button below to connect via Notion auth:
msg_notion_error: An error occurred while loading Notion settings. Try reconnecting using /disconnect -> /connect
msg_connect_notion: Click the button below to authenticate:
msg_already_connected: You are already connected to Notion: *{workspace}*
msg_disconnected: Your Notion integration was successfully completely disabled! Use /connect to reconnect.
msg_disconnect_error: An error occurred during disconnection or you are not connected.
msg_notion_connected_success: 🎉 Success! Your Notion is connected and databases are configured.
msg_notion_connect_failed: ❌ Failed to connect. It seems you didn't finish the process, or an error occurred on the server.
msg_notion_connected_no_dbs: ⚠️ Notion connected, but I couldn't find the required databases in the selected template. Please make sure you added the template, and try /disconnect and /connect again.
msg_no_data_for_period: No data found for the selected period.
msg_report_error: ❌ An error occurred while generating the report.
msg_no_data_for_comparison: No data available for comparison in the selected periods.
